# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine sync and bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and resolves a native resource leak in image decoding.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Brings in the latest chrome/m151 patch-level fixes from upstream Skia. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) no longer leaks the underlying native image handle. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
